description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for windows and balcony railings. The structure features multiple rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered facade. The front of the house includes a covered entryway, flanked by palm trees and a driveway leading to the main entrance. A spacious swimming pool wraps around one side of the house, with a secondary, smaller pool or water feature on the opposite side. The property is set on a manicured green lawn bordered by a sidewalk and street, with minimalistic landscaping. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and a luxurious, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a wraparound swimming pool, set on a manicured lawn with palm trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered entryway, palm trees, and the swimming pool extending along the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, main entry, and the smaller pool or water feature on the left side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the swimming pool, extensive glass balcony railings, and the open backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the layered structure, glass features, and the continuation of the pool and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entryway with wide steps, minimalistic columns, and a direct driveway approach flanked by palm trees
